title: 2026-03-09 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 41.80
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-03-09: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 41.80/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-03-09, the score printed 41.80/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
